Home Claims Handler

Regards,
Chris Ashford

Thanks,
Tom Edwards
Border Loss Adjusters

messages.body:

Thanks for the dates. Please book Wednesday 18th Feb at 10:30. Also, can you confirm if the cost of upgrading the alarm following the burglary is covered under my policy? I'm keen to get this sorted this weekend.

Regards,
Chris Ashford
PIN-HOM-483912

messages.body:
Morning,

We're chasing parts authority for PIN-MTR-552301 (2019 Volvo V40 - rear bumper, sensors and loom). We submitted the OEM parts list and labour hours last week and the customer is on our back about completion timing. Please confirm if we can order today.

Attached: Estimate and parts breakdown (OEM).

Thanks,
Steel City Bodyshop Service Team
messages.subject: PIN-MTR-552301 - Parts authority required (Volvo V40 rear bumper & sensors)

messages.body:
Hi Engineering,

Could you review the Steel City estimate vs our report for PIN-MTR-552301 and confirm authority? Policyholder chasing a completion date.

Thanks,
Matt
Motor Claims
messages.subject: FW: PIN-MTR-552301 - Parts authority required (Volvo V40 rear bumper & sensors)

messages.body:
Hi Matt,

Engineer's note: Recommend aftermarket bumper cover due to OEM back order; sensors must be OEM. Labour looks fine at 5.2 hours. If bodyshop accepts mixed parts, we can authorise today.

Regards,
A. Patel
Motor Engineering
messages.subject: RE: PIN-MTR-552301 - Engineering review

messages.body:
Hi Steel City,

We can authorise sensors OEM and loom OEM; bumper may be aftermarket equivalent due to OEM back order. Please confirm acceptance and provide a target completion date so we can update the policyholder.

Thanks,
Matt
Pinnacle Motor Claims
messages.subject: RE: PIN-MTR-552301 - Conditional parts authority

messages.body:
Thanks Matt,

We'll proceed with mixed parts as advised. Target completion if parts ordered today is Friday 20th Feb. Please send written authority so accounts can place orders.

Regards,
Steel City Bodyshop
Sheffield
messages.subject: RE: PIN-MTR-552301 - Confirmation and completion date

I own a Grade II listed townhouse in York (YO1). We've had storm damage to original sash windows and I'd like to understand if our policy covers repair or replacement of historic features, and whether you have approved heritage glaziers.

Please advise on cover, matching items considerations, and any contractors you recommend.

Edward Marston
Marston & Co.

messages.body:
Hi Team,

Attached is the CCTV survey report and photographs for the collapsed drain at the semi-detached house in Leicester (LE2), subsidence claim PIN-HOM-508377. The footage indicates significant root ingress from the pavement ash tree.

Please review findings and advise on next steps, including any liaison with the local authority about the street tree.

Regards,
Rapid Drainage Reports
messages.subject: PIN-HOM-508377 - CCTV drain survey and photos (root ingress identified)

messages.body:
Thanks for the survey.

@Adjuster - can you compare findings against policy coverage for root ingress and let us know if we need to approach the council's tree officer?

Cheers,
Dan
Pinnacle Home Claims
messages.subject: FW: PIN-HOM-508377 - Root ingress and LA involvement?

messages.body:
Afternoon,

We've reviewed the CCTV. Policy has limited cover for resultant damage, not tree removal. We suggest root cutting within boundary and liaising with Leicester City Council about the ash tree. We'll draft next steps.

Regards,
Border Loss Adjusters
messages.subject: RE: PIN-HOM-508377 - Adjuster view on root ingress

messages.body:
Hi Claims Team,

My 2014 Renault Trafic van (reg: BJ14 UMX) was stolen overnight from outside my house in Byker, Newcastle (NE6). The van had copper piping and battery tools worth around GBP3,000 inside. I've reported it to Northumbria Police - crime ref: 2602X/2026.

I have a tracker installed and it pinged near Gateshead around 02:30 but then went silent. I don't have a spare vehicle, so I need help with a hire van if my policy allows.

Policy no: MTR-COM-554872
Contact: 07876 991002

Please open a theft claim and tell me what proof of ownership and tools inventory you need. Happy to send receipts. Also, let me know about any limits on tools left in the van overnight.

Regards,
Nathan Bradley Plumbing & Heating

messages.body:
Dear Claims Team,

We had a slip-and-fall incident outside our café this morning in Cardiff city centre (CF10). Rainwater pooled just inside the entrance and a customer fell. Staff completed an incident report and we have CCTV that shows the area and the fall.

We've assisted the customer and logged the incident. Please open a public liability claim and advise what you need from us (CCTV, incident report, witness statements). Our café details are below.

Cafe Name: Hayes Street Café, CF10
Contact: 07803 441221

Regards,
Eleri Hughes
Manager
messages.subject: CF10 café slip-and-fall incident - request to open PL claim

messages.body:
Dear Pinnacle Insurance Claims,

We act for Ms Angharad Davies in relation to injuries sustained in a slip-and-fall at the café entrance referenced below. We are formally putting you on notice of our client's claim. Rainwater had pooled near the threshold and our client fell, sustaining a wrist injury and back pain.

Please acknowledge receipt, confirm your indemnity position, and let us know where to send CCTV and the incident report. We will seek disclosure of the cleaning/inspection regime. Kindly provide your claim reference under your public liability policy.

Client: Ms Angharad Davies
Incident: 12/02/2026, Cardiff CF10

Regards,
Rhys Williams
Morgan Rowe Solicitors
029 20 555 781
messages.subject: Notice of Claim - Slip-and-fall outside insured café, Cardiff (CF10)

messages.body:

We served our client's orthopaedic report under PIN-LIA-771045 ten days ago and have not yet received your indemnity position or an indication of your timetable for response and any offer. The incident involved a trip on uneven paving outside the insured's premises in Leith (EH6).

Please confirm receipt of the report and advise next steps.

Regards,
Kirsty MacLeod
Caledonia Law
0131 228 7711

We acknowledge your letter of claim and note your intention to serve medical evidence. Please forward the orthopaedic report and schedule of loss for PIN-LIA-771045 to this address and we will review promptly.

Regards,
Pinnacle Liability Team

messages.body:
Further to the above, please note the orthopaedic report was served on 08/02/2026. We would appreciate confirmation of your indemnity stance and whether any further evidence is required from our client.

Regards,
Kirsty MacLeod
Caledonia Law

messages.body:
Dear Pinnacle,

I own a holiday cottage near Portree, Isle of Skye (IV51). Last night's gale has ripped multiple slates from the roof of my listed property. There's water coming into the lounge and the plaster on the ceiling is bowing.

The property is currently vacant but my neighbour has placed buckets and sent me photos. Please register a home claim and arrange for a local emergency roofer to make safe and tarp it. As it's a listed building, I'd like a loss adjuster with heritage experience, and confirmation of any listed building requirements in the process.

Policy number: HOM-HOL-993241
Contact: 07498 220673

Kind regards,
Mhairi Smith

Five days after you told me a courtesy van would be sorted for PIN-MTR-560442, nothing has materialised. I've had multiple missed call-backs and I'm losing income each day without the van.

Please escalate and arrange a hire vehicle today. I expect some goodwill given the inconvenience.

Regards,
Connor Rafferty
Liverpool L13
Tel: 07761 552144

messages.body:
Hi Connor,

I'm sorry for the delay. I've chased our hire provider and asked them to prioritise PIN-MTR-560442 today. I'll update you by lunchtime with delivery timing.

Regards,
Jade
Pinnacle Motor Claims

messages.body:
Afternoon Jade,

No one has called and I still don't have a van. This is unacceptable. Please sort this today and confirm what goodwill you're offering.

Connor

We write to allege a data protection breach in relation to PIN-LIA-752388. Documents were emailed to the wrong party. Please provide details of the incident and confirm escalation to your Data Protection Officer. Our client reserves all rights.

We ask that you secure any mis‑sent data immediately and provide confirmation of steps taken.

Yours faithfully,
Daniel Jameson
Taylor & Sons Solicitors

Regards,
Daniel Jameson

messages.body:
Hi Claims,

Re: PIN-HOM-419876 (West Bridgford, NG2) - we completed crack monitoring 8 weeks ago. The tenant is now reporting sticking doors and is anxious about safety. The landlord has asked when underpinning will start.

Could you please confirm the adjuster's conclusions and the contractor mobilisation dates? We'll need to set expectations on duration and whether alternative accommodation is appropriate.

Thanks,
Sam Ramsey
Harper Broking
messages.subject: PIN-HOM-419876 - Subsidence remediation timeline and tenant concerns

messages.body:
Hi Adjusting Team,

Please review PIN-HOM-419876 monitoring results and confirm scope/mobilisation for underpinning, plus any requirement for tenant decant.

Thanks,
Ella
Pinnacle Home Claims
messages.subject: FW: PIN-HOM-419876 - Underpinning start date?

messages.body:
Afternoon,

Monitoring indicates progressive movement at 2.8mm over 6 months. We recommend underpinning the front elevation and raft tie‑in. Mobilisation could commence w/c 23rd Feb subject to permits. Tenant decant for 2-3 weeks advised during excavation.

Regards,
Northshore Engineering
messages.subject: RE: PIN-HOM-419876 - Engineering recommendation

messages.body:
Hi Sam,

Engineering recommend underpinning the front elevation; target start w/c 23rd Feb pending permits. Tenant decant for approx. 2-3 weeks during excavation.

We're contacting the contractor to confirm mobilisation dates. Will update you and the tenant by tomorrow.

Regards,
Ella
Pinnacle Home Claims
messages.subject: RE: PIN-HOM-419876 - Update on scope and dates

messages.body:
Evening Ella,

Thanks for the outline. The tenant is very nervous--please confirm the exact start date and decant arrangements by close tomorrow. If permits are an issue, set out what's outstanding and who is chasing.

Regards,
Sam
messages.subject: RE: PIN-HOM-419876 - Confirmation needed on underpinning start

messages.body:
Morning,

Following up to ask if permits have been cleared and to request the contractor mobilisation date for underpinning PIN-HOM-419876. Please also confirm tenant decant arrangements and likely duration so we can brief them.

Regards,
Sam Ramsey
Harper & Vale Insurance (formerly Harper Broking)
messages.subject: RE: PIN-HOM-419876 - Underpinning mobilisation date and tenant decant

messages.body:
This week's canteen menu is attached. 

Enjoy,
Canteen Team
messages.subject: Weekly canteen menu

messages.body:
Dear Pinnacle Claims,

We're escalating a client complaint regarding your repudiation of storm damage to a holiday let in Cardiff Bay (CF10), claim PIN-HOM-544210. We believe your interpretation of wind‑driven rain is ambiguous in the policy wording.

We have provided meteorological data indicating wind speeds and rainfall patterns consistent with ingress. Please review the declinature rationale and confirm the formal complaint pathway.

Regards,
Sarah Thomas
Welsh Cover Brokers
messages.subject: Complaint escalation - PIN-HOM-544210 (storm damage repudiation, wind-driven rain)

messages.body:
Hi Underwriting/Technical,

Please review PIN-HOM-544210 declinature against policy wording (wind-driven rain) and the broker's met data. We need a position and the appropriate complaint response path.

Thanks,
Home Claims
messages.subject: FW: PIN-HOM-544210 - Technical review required

messages.body:
Technical view: Wording excludes gradual ingress. Evidence suggests a single storm event caused water penetration. Recommend partial acceptance for resultant damage; exclude pre‑existing defects. Complaints path: final response within 8 weeks.

Regards,
Technical
messages.subject: RE: PIN-HOM-544210 - Technical recommendation

messages.body:
Thanks for the technical view.

Please confirm you're issuing a revised position in line with this recommendation and set out the formal complaint response pathway to our client.

Regards,
Sarah Thomas
messages.subject: RE: Complaint escalation - PIN-HOM-544210 - Awaiting revised position

messages.body:
Underwriting bulletin: Flood excess waiver will be withdrawn for postcodes in high-risk bands in Cumbria from next month. This is a heads-up to Claims--expect customer queries and check messaging.

UW Team
messages.subject: Underwriting bulletin - Flood excess waiver withdrawn (Cumbria high-risk bands)

messages.body:
Hello,

I'm chasing the business interruption payout under PIN-LIA-663210. We had to close the café temporarily for investigation after a customer injury claim. I sent our takings records last week and we're struggling with payroll--could you arrange an interim payment to cover wages?

Please confirm your indemnity approach and likely timeline.

Thanks,
Megan Evans
Wrexham (LL11)
messages.subject: PIN-LIA-663210 - Request for interim BI payment and timeline

messages.body:
Hi Megan,

We've received your takings records. Our BI team is reviewing admissible losses in line with the closure period. We'll confirm the indemnity position and whether an interim is appropriate.

Regards,
Lewis
Pinnacle Liability Claims
messages.subject: RE: PIN-LIA-663210 - BI documentation received

messages.body:
Hi BI Team,

Please review the takings records for PIN-LIA-663210 and advise on interim payment for wages. Customer requesting urgent timeline.

Thanks,
Lewis
messages.subject: FW: PIN-LIA-663210 - BI review and interim request

messages.body:
Thanks for the update, Lewis.

Could you confirm by tomorrow if you're making an interim payment? Staff are anxious and payday is Friday.

Thanks,
Megan
messages.subject: RE: PIN-LIA-663210 - Interim payment confirmation

messages.body:

I've got a small chip in my 2017 Skoda Fabia windscreen. What's the process to get it repaired and will it affect my no claims discount? If you have a preferred supplier, please share their contact details.

Thanks,
Nina Patel
Manchester M14
messages.subject: Windscreen chip repair - process and NCD impact (Skoda Fabia 2017)

messages.body:
Hello Pinnacle Claims,

I'm reporting a kitchen fire at our Victorian terrace in Headingley, Leeds (LS6 2...). An oil pan ignited late last night and the fire brigade attended and extinguished it. We're all safe, but there is smoke damage through the ground floor, some scorched cabinets, and one of the sash windows has cracked from the heat.

The children are temporarily staying with their grandparents in Roundhay so we can clean up. I've attached a few photos from this morning. Please register a home claim and let me know about next steps for assessment, emergency clean-up, and whether you can help with short‑term accommodation if required.

Policy number: HOM-PL-771932
Contact: 07885 662144

Thank you,
Amelia Hartley
messages.subject: FNOL: Late-night kitchen fire at Headingley (LS6) - smoke damage and cracked sash window

messages.body:

Please find attached our detailed scope of works, itemised estimate, and programme for reinstatement following the kitchen fire at Sheffield (S7) under PIN-HOM-489020. Note: the heritage coving will require a specialist subcontractor.

Kindly review against the adjuster's recommendations and advise on authority or any revisions required.

Regards,
Estimating Team
Whitaker Restoration

Thanks,
Pinnacle Home Claims

messages.body:

Regards,
Whitaker Restoration

messages.body:
Dear Claims Team,

I need to report a serious incident with my vehicle. My 2018 Kia Sportage (reg: FN18 ZJO) was inundated by seawater during the overnight tidal surge in Morecambe. It was parked along the promenade near LA4 5AS, and when I went to it this morning the interior was soaked, the electrics were flickering on and off, and there's a strong saltwater smell. The engine won't start.

I've attached photos and a short video from my phone showing the state of the cabin and the water line. I'm a self‑employed decorator and rely on the car for booked jobs this week, so I need guidance on recovery and a hire car if possible.

Policy number: MTR-PL-239011
Contact: 07974 215836

Please can you register the claim and arrange recovery to an approved site as soon as possible? Also advise whether this is likely to be a total loss or if decontamination is attempted.

Thanks,
James Turner
Morecambe
messages.subject: FNOL: 2018 Kia Sportage inundated by tidal surge in Morecambe (LA4)

Dear Pinnacle Claims,

We wish to lodge a formal complaint regarding the handling of PIN-HOM-501772 (chimney collapse following a storm). It took three weeks to arrange temporary repairs and communication has been poor throughout. We had to heat only one room to keep warm.

Please acknowledge this complaint and confirm the next steps and a single point of contact.

Yours sincerely,
Peter & Janet Howard
Durham DH1
Tel: 07779 241802

messages.body:

We are very sorry for the distress caused. Your complaint has been logged with our Complaints team today. A dedicated handler will contact you by close of business tomorrow with a holding response and an action plan.

Kind regards,
Pinnacle Home Claims

messages.body:
Update as promised: the full report for PIN-HOM-555901 will be issued by midday tomorrow. No immediate safety concerns identified.

Regards,
Border Loss Adjusters
messages.subject: RE: Site attendance - PIN-HOM-555901 - report timing

messages.body:
Hi Motor Theft Team,

Can we get a status update on PIN-MTR-590234 (Hyundai i40 theft - Gateshead)? The telematics anomaly we discussed at last week's case conference remains unresolved. Is the claim still on hold and has a recorded interview been scheduled with the policyholder?

Please confirm planned actions and dates.

Fraud Team
messages.subject: PIN-MTR-590234 - Fraud status update and RI scheduling

messages.body:
Hi SIU,

Please confirm if we're maintaining the hold on PIN-MTR-590234 pending RI. Also advise whether the telematics provider responded to the anomaly query.

Thanks,
Motor Theft
messages.subject: FW: PIN-MTR-590234 - Hold status and telematics

messages.body:
Team,

Circling back--can we have confirmation today whether the RI is booked and if the claim remains on hold? We need to update case conference notes.

Thanks,
Fraud Team
messages.subject: RE: PIN-MTR-590234 - Confirmation required on hold/RI

messages.body:
Good afternoon,

Please find enclosed a secure link to dashcam footage relating to PIN-MTR-575842 (roundabout incident on A184, Gateshead). Our liability stance letter proposing a 50/50 apportionment is attached.

Secure link: https://secure.northernmutual.co.uk/dashcam/PIN-MTR-575842
Access code: A184-575842

Kindly review the footage and advise your position.

Regards,
Northern Mutual Motor Claims
messages.subject: PIN-MTR-575842 - Dashcam footage link and liability stance (A184 roundabout)

messages.body:
Hi Team,

Please download and review the dashcam footage for PIN-MTR-575842 alongside the insured's statement. We need to decide if we accept 50/50 or counter.

Thanks,
Ben
Pinnacle Motor Claims
messages.subject: FW: PIN-MTR-575842 - Review dashcam and liability stance

messages.body:
Motor Engineering view: The dashcam indicates our insured was in the correct lane but drifted slightly. The other vehicle entered late. We'd recommend countering at 75/25 in our favour with lane discipline cited.

A. Patel
messages.subject: RE: PIN-MTR-575842 - Engineering liability view

messages.body:
Thank you for the prompt review.

Please send us your formal position once decided. We'll keep the portal link open for 7 days.

Northern Mutual
messages.subject: RE: PIN-MTR-575842 - Awaiting your formal position

messages.body:
To whom it may concern,

I'm very upset that our damp/mould claim PIN-HOM-536909 was closed without anyone coming to look. I sent photos and explained our tenant has health concerns (breathing issues). We are not neglecting maintenance--this is getting worse.

Please reopen and arrange an inspection as soon as possible. I need clear timescales and a named contact. I want to log this as a formal complaint.

Sadia Khan
Birmingham B29
messages.subject: Complaint and request to reopen - PIN-HOM-536909 (damp/mould, tenant health)

messages.body:
Dear Ms Khan,

We're sorry for the distress caused. We have reopened PIN-HOM-536909 for review and will arrange an inspection to differentiate maintenance from insured peril. A complaints case is logged and we will confirm timescales tomorrow.

Kind regards,
Pinnacle Home Claims
messages.subject: RE: Complaint - PIN-HOM-536909 reopened and inspection to be arranged

messages.body:
Dear Pinnacle,

Please find attached our invoice for six months of crack monitoring at the Leeds (LS17) property under PIN-HOM-419876. The invoice totals GBP1,140 + VAT. Monitoring logs are attached for filing.

Regards,
Northshore Engineering Billing
messages.subject: Invoice - PIN-HOM-419876 (GBP1,140 + VAT) - monitoring logs attached

messages.body:
Please confirm services were authorised and process the invoice under PIN-HOM-419876. Logs to be filed to the claim record.

Regards,
Billing
Northshore Engineering
messages.subject: RE: Invoice - PIN-HOM-419876 - Confirmation and processing
